iotanalytics.channel.CfnAbout: The AWS::IoTAnalytics::Channel resource collects data from an MQTT topic and archives the raw, unprocessed messages before publishing the data to a pipeline. For more information, see [ How to Use AWS IoT Analytics](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iotanalytics/latest/userguide/welcome.html

iotanalytics.channel.RetentionPeriod.Description: How long, in days, message data is kept for the channel.

iotanalytics.channel.Tags.Description: Metadata which can be used to manage the channel.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
